chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-331 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit Langah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG files statement along with compliance report and submits that compliance of order dated 06.08.2025 has been made. Counsel for the petitioner confirms the same and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, instant petition is hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
